---
title: "Project Report"
subtitle: "Building a RAG System I Can Explain — Completion"
author: "Alan McDonagh (A00052777)"
date: today
date-format: "DD MMMM YYYY"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
# Render the completion report from the Sphinx source markdown
import pathlib
content = pathlib.Path("../docs/_source/output_report.md").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
# Strip the H1 title (rendered by Quarto YAML) and the first horizontal rule
lines = content.split("\n")
body_lines = []
skip_next_blank = False
found_first_rule = False
for line in lines[1:]:  # skip the H1
    if line.strip() == "---" and not found_first_rule:
        found_first_rule = True
        continue
    body_lines.append(line)
from IPython.display import Markdown
Markdown("\n".join(body_lines))
```
